title: more enchantments by soybeani 豆浆更多附魔
description: A series of interesting modules made from soybeani. There are a lot of interesting enchantments in it. Of course, there may be imperfections or bugs. You can ask me questions in time and I will actively repair them
body:
A series of interesting modules made from soybeani. There are a lot of interesting enchantments in it. Of course, there may be imperfections or bugs. You can ask me questions in time and I will actively repair them.Need to be added on the client and server. it add enchantments such as:
- Fire Walker: Leaves a trail of fire while walking, igniting enemies along the path.
- To Friend: Temporarily turns hostile creatures into allies to attack others.
- Explosive Coin: Randomly drops any item when attacking.
- Ramble: Creates blocks under your feet when you jump.
- Air Swim: Simulates a dying fish on land, flopping around awkwardly.
- Static: Immobilizes yourself, making you unable to move.
- Rebel: Randomly chains a block after mining one.
- Revive: Causes mined blocks to drop and respawn.
- Glamorous Debut: Causes Ender Pearls to trigger a flash effect upon landing, stunning nearby enemies.
- Rage: Boosts attack power and speed, making you the best partner for a farmer.
- Water Walker: Turns the area you walk on into water.
- Fire Recover: Heals yourself through fire and grants immunity to fire damage.
- Flower Walker: Plants flowers and grass as you walk.
- Fire Path: Shoots arrows that leave a trail of fire, burning all enemies they pass.
- Amaterasu: Unleashes powerful flames that set everything in your line of sight ablaze, instantly incinerating enemies.
- Spider Power: Grants the ability to climb walls and move freely like a spider.
- Draw Circle: Traps enemies within a circle, preventing them from escaping.
- Channeling Revise: Continuously summons lightning strikes to hit enemies or yourself.
- Feng Dan Blessing: Provides a powerful blessing that enhances your abilities related to water
And many more...


豆浆制作的一个模组有趣模组系列，里面有大量有意思的附魔，当然可能有不完善的地方，也可能会遇到bug，可以及时向我提出问题，我会积极的修复的。需要在服务端和客户端添加，添加了附魔例如:
- 火焰行者（Fire Walker）: 在行走时留下火焰，点燃路径上的敌人。
- 化敌为友（To Friend）: 改变敌对生物的态度，使其短暂成为你的盟友攻击别人。
- 爆金币（Explosive Coin）: 攻击时随机掉落任何物品。
- 漫步（Ramble）: 起跳时，在脚底产生方块。
- 死鱼模拟器（Air Swim）: 在陆地像条快死掉的鱼一样。
- 静止（Static）: 使自己在无法移动。
- 随机连锁（Rebel）: 挖取方块后，随机连锁一个方块。
- 重生（Revive）: 挖取方块后，该方块掉落并且重生。
- 闪亮登场（Glamorous Debut）: 末影珍珠在接触地面时触发闪光效果，震慑附近的敌人。
- 农场主的鼓励（Rage）: 提升攻击力和速度，是农场主的最佳搭档。
- 水之行者（Water Walker）: 行走的地方都是水。
- 烈火治愈（Fire Recover）: 通过火焰来治疗自己，免疫火焰伤害。
- 花草行者（Flower Walker）: 在行走时种植花草。
- 火焰之径（Fire Path）: 弓箭射出留下一条火焰路径，燃烧所有经过的敌人。
- 天照（Amaterasu）: 释放强大的火焰，所看之处都是火焰，瞬间烧毁敌人。
- 蜘蛛之力（Spider Power）: 提供攀爬墙壁的能力，像蜘蛛一样自由行动。
- 画地为牢（Draw Circle）: 通过画圈禁锢敌人，使其无法逃脱。
- 雷电行者（Channeling Revise）: 一直召唤雷电打击敌人或自己。
- 枫丹祝福（Feng Dan）: 提供强大的祝福效果，增强你的对水能力。

...具体可以在bilibili搜索豆浆不是笨蛋
